title: A Neko Crafted Adventure
description: Another unpolished adventure modpack with custom origins, lootbags and many structures to explore
body:
# A Neko Crafted Adventure (aka Update 1.69.3) Just another adventure modpack. No quests (yet), no restrictions. Just an average sandbox modded minecraft with no real end goal and many various little issues (probably). ## Modpack Features - Somewhat complex and custom Origins with races, classes & affinities [WIP] - Custom Loot Bag mod with custom loot configuration (I'll release it by itself one day) - Complete world generation overhaul (height and depth increased) - Many structures and lootable locations - Fancy weapons & combat - Different and more 'intense' Dragon & Wither fights **Recommended Memory/RAM is 8gb or above.**
FAQ that aren't frequent or asked - **What are the custom Origins?** - The Origins are still very early stages and a work in progress. There are 20 Races, 36 Classes & 6 Affinities planned however only 12 Classes are available to select. - **Races**: **Human, Arachna, Centaur, Demon, Dragonkin, Dryad, Dwarf, Elf, Fairy, Kobold, Nereid, Orc, Scylla, Seraph, Taurus & Halfkin races (Bunny, Cat, Fox, Tanuki, Wolf)** - **Classes**: **Acolyte, Apprentice, Archer, Blacksmith, Caster, Fighter, Hunter, Scholar, Shaman, Templar, Thief, Worker** - **Affinities**: **These do nothing yet so I'm not gonna list them.** - **Where quests?** - Where good quest mod - **Why the name?** - Because I suck at naming things and most people call me Neko at this point.
***Incase it wasn't clear, this modpack is very much a work in progress and not the final design/vision but it's in a rather playable state and not many big breaking changes will be done however as I'm working on other projects this most likely won't be finished for a long time.***
